brief: Memory links a late-night porch conversation with two recurring themes: wanting slower mornings and building things that feel humane instead of extractive. Related notes point to product direction, neighborhood belonging, and a recurring image of warm light through old windows.
searchSummary: travel note, family memory, linked events
whyItMatters: One memory becomes part of a connected search surface.
